response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and platforms, but lacks the required mandatory C++ development experience on Windows for capital markets/fixed income systems. While they have C/C++ exposure, it is not recent (last C++ work was in 2015) and not in the financial domain. Their domain expertise is in GIS/Geo-Data and investment practices, which does not directly align with fixed income or capital markets systems.
strengths: Strong multi-language expertise (C++, C, D, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python)
Experience with investment practices and software craftsmanship methodologies (TDD, CI/CD)
Proven track record of building scalable systems and open-source contributions
concerns: Lacks recent and substantial C++ Windows development experience (last in 2015)
No demonstrated experience in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking systems
Domain expertise does not align with the financial systems required for this role
